action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Need to build a HumanoidBench RL pipeline for 10 tasks with 61-dim action space. Analysis: Given 30 iterations and 10h budget, I'll start with SAC (more sample efficient than PPO for continuous control) per-task. First iteration: validate pipeline with quick test on one task. Decision: Write a quick test script first to verify env setup, then build training infrastructure.
